description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, likely finished in concrete or stucco, with large horizontal windows that provide ample natural light. Several palm trees and shrubs are positioned around the house, suggesting a landscaped yard typical of suburban or urban environments in warm climates. The structure features multiple roof levels and a prominent entryway with steps leading up to the main door. The house has a minimalist aesthetic, with simple lines and little ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and openness. The overall design is spacious, with a broad footprint and integrated outdoor greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large horizontal windows, and landscaped surroundings featuring palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, flat roof, and two palm trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the entry steps, a prominent palm tree, and more visible landscaping on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional roof features, and a palm tree on the right.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the flat roof, horizontal window, and a palm tree close to the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, minimal overhang, and a simple, modern door
